import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut start = -1
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if is_ws
      if start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        when None
          let _skip = 0
        end
        start = -1
      end
    else
      if start < 0
        start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      let _skip = 0
    end
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut is_first = true
  let n = nums.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let v = match nums.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if v > t
      if is_first
        out = "#{v}"
        is_first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
